scripts.build: npm run build:landing && npm run build:extension
scripts.lint: npm run lint:landing && npm run lint:extension
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @imongspend/landing && npm run typecheck --workspace @imongspend/extension && npm run typecheck --workspace @imongspend/shared
scripts.version:extension: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); const next=process.argv[1]; if(!next||!/^[0-9]+\.[0-9]+\.[0-9]+$/.test(next)){console.error('Usage: npm run version:extension -- <major.minor.patch>'); process.exit(1);} const files=['apps/extension/public/manifest.json','apps/extension/package.json']; for(const file of files){const json=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(file,'utf8')); json.version=next; fs.writeFileSync(file, JSON.stringify(json, null, 2)+'\n');} console.log('Updated extension version to', next);"
